# FirstTouch — Complete Documentation for AI Agents
# Version: 1.0 | Updated: 2026-03-16

## PRODUCT OVERVIEW

FirstTouch is an AI manager operating system for B2B companies (20-200 employees) in Europe. It automates recurring management tasks: meeting transcription, weekly reporting, knowledge base queries, cross-department updates, and workflow orchestration.

Key differentiator: deploys on customer infrastructure. No data leaves their servers. Full GDPR compliance. Model-agnostic — works with Claude, GPT-4, Ollama, or any LLM.

Primary interface: Telegram Bot. Secondary: REST API, Webhooks.

## FEATURES

### Meeting Intelligence
- Real-time transcription of meetings (Zoom, Teams, Google Meet)
- Automatic action item extraction with assignee detection
- Follow-up tracking and reminder generation
- Meeting summary distribution via Telegram

### Automated Reporting
- Weekly status reports generated from actual work data (not self-reported)
- Cross-department activity summaries
- KPI tracking with trend analysis
- Custom report templates per role

### Knowledge Base (RAG)
- Ingest company documents: SOPs, policies, contracts, product docs
- Natural language queries via Telegram: "What's our refund policy for enterprise clients?"
- Role-level access control — users see only what they're authorized to see
- Auto-updating: new documents ingested automatically from connected sources
- Supported formats: PDF, DOCX, MD, TXT, HTML, Google Docs

### Workflow Automation
- Trigger-based actions: "When a deal closes, generate onboarding checklist"
- Approval workflows with human-in-the-loop checkpoints
- Multi-step sequences with conditional logic
- Integration with external tools via webhooks

### Multi-Model Orchestration
- Route tasks to the best model: coding → Claude, summarization → GPT-4, embeddings → local model
- Automatic failover between models
- Cost optimization: use local models for simple tasks, cloud models for complex ones
- No vendor lock-in — swap models without code changes

### Security & Compliance
- On-premise deployment: all data stays on customer infrastructure
- EU data residency guaranteed
- GDPR-compliant by design: data minimization, right to deletion, audit logging
- Role-based access: Admin, Manager, User, Read-only
- Full audit trail: every query, response, and action logged
- SOC 2 aligned practices

## ARCHITECTURE

```
[User] → [Telegram Bot] → [FirstTouch API]
                                ↓
                    [Orchestration Engine]
                    /        |         \
            [LLM Router] [RAG Engine] [Action Engine]
               ↓              ↓            ↓
        [Claude/GPT/Ollama] [Vector DB] [Webhooks/APIs]
```

Components:
- **API Gateway** — REST API, authentication, rate limiting
- **Orchestration Engine** — task routing, context management, memory
- **LLM Router** — model selection based on task type, cost, latency
- **RAG Engine** — document ingestion, embedding, semantic search
- **Action Engine** — webhook triggers, approval workflows, notifications
- **Vector Database** — document embeddings for knowledge base queries
- **Audit Logger** — full trace of all operations

## DEPLOYMENT

### On-Premise (recommended for enterprise)
- Docker Compose or Kubernetes
- Minimum: 4 CPU, 16GB RAM, 100GB storage
- Supports: Ubuntu 22.04+, RHEL 8+, any Docker-compatible OS
- Local LLM option: Ollama with open-source models (no cloud dependency)

### Cloud (for smaller teams)
- Managed deployment on EU infrastructure (Hetzner, OVH)
- Data stays in EU (Frankfurt or Prague datacenter)
- Automatic updates and monitoring

### Setup Timeline
- Day 1: Infrastructure setup, Telegram bot connection
- Day 2-3: Document ingestion, knowledge base seeding
- Day 4-5: Role configuration, workflow setup
- Week 2: Team onboarding, feedback loop

## PRICING

| Tier | Users | Features | Price |
|------|-------|----------|-------|
| Starter | Up to 5 | Core features, Telegram, basic reporting | Contact sales |
| Pro | Up to 25 | All features, custom integrations, priority support | Contact sales |
| Enterprise | Unlimited | On-premise, SLA, dedicated support, custom models | Contact sales |

All tiers include: 14-day pilot, setup assistance, training session.

## API REFERENCE

### Authentication
All API requests require Bearer token in Authorization header.
```
Authorization: Bearer ft_your_api_key_here
```

### Endpoints

POST /api/v1/query
- Send a natural language query to the knowledge base
- Body: { "query": "string", "user_id": "string", "context": "string" }
- Response: { "answer": "string", "sources": [], "confidence": float }

POST /api/v1/meeting/transcribe
- Submit meeting audio for transcription
- Body: multipart/form-data with audio file
- Response: { "transcript": "string", "action_items": [], "summary": "string" }

GET /api/v1/reports/weekly
- Generate weekly report for specified team/department
- Params: ?team=engineering&week=2026-W12
- Response: { "report": "string", "metrics": {}, "highlights": [] }

POST /api/v1/workflow/trigger
- Trigger a workflow by name
- Body: { "workflow": "string", "params": {} }
- Response: { "execution_id": "string", "status": "running" }

GET /api/v1/status
- Health check and system status
- Response: { "status": "ok", "version": "string", "uptime": int }

### Webhooks
FirstTouch can send webhooks for events:
- meeting.transcribed — meeting transcription completed
- report.generated — weekly report ready
- workflow.completed — workflow execution finished
- approval.required — human approval needed

Webhook payload:
```json
{
  "event": "meeting.transcribed",
  "timestamp": "2026-03-16T12:00:00Z",
  "data": { ... }
}
```

## INTEGRATION EXAMPLES

### Telegram Bot Setup
1. Create bot via @BotFather
2. Set webhook: POST /api/v1/telegram/webhook with bot token
3. Users interact via Telegram — no app installation needed

### Slack Integration
- Incoming webhooks for report delivery
- Slash commands for queries: /ft ask "What's our Q1 pipeline?"

### CRM Integration (HubSpot, Pipedrive)
- Webhook triggers on deal stage changes
- Automatic meeting summary logging to CRM contacts
- Lead scoring enrichment from meeting insights

## COMPETITIVE POSITIONING

vs ChatGPT/Claude direct:
- FirstTouch knows YOUR data, not just the internet
- Role-based access (ChatGPT is all-or-nothing)
- On-premise option (no data to OpenAI/Anthropic)
- Workflow automation (not just Q&A)

vs Lindy.ai / Beam AI:
- EU-first: GDPR compliant, EU data residency
- On-premise deployment option
- Model-agnostic (not locked to one provider)
- Telegram-native (no separate app)

vs Building in-house:
- 2-week deployment vs 6-month build
- Maintained and updated continuously
- Multi-model orchestration out of the box
- Fraction of the cost of a dedicated AI team

## MCP (Model Context Protocol) — Coming Soon

FirstTouch will expose an MCP server allowing AI agents to:
- Query the knowledge base programmatically
- Trigger workflows
- Read reports and meeting summaries
- Manage user permissions

This enables AI-to-AI integration: external agents can use FirstTouch as a tool.
